---
title: "EconLit"
page-layout: article
---

# EconLit

**Provider:** ProQuest

## Description

Comprehensive index of economics literature including journal articles, books, working papers, dissertations, conference proceedings, and reviews. Supports scholarly research in economics and related fields.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://search.proquest.com/econlit?accountid=15172)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
